params.prompt: Summarise the top story on news.ycombinator.com in one sentence
Go to google.com, decline any cookie consent automatically, and tell me the Google homepage tagline
Go to en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eiffel_Tower — when did construction begin and how tall is it?
Go to bbc.co.uk/news and tell me the top story headline
Go to github.com — what is the main tagline?
Go to reddit.com/r/technology — what is the top post title right now?
Go to nytimes.com, decline cookies, and tell me one headline
Go to techcrunch.com and tell me the title of the latest article
Go to en.wikipedia.org/wiki/SpaceX — when was it founded and by whom?
Go to producthunt.com — what is the top product today?
